title: lobelia stolonifera
intro: Lobelia stolonifera, also known as Japanese lobelia, is a type of flowering plant native to Japan and Korea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Lobelia stolonifera is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and acting as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps. Herbal preparations of Lobelia stolonifera are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
